Here is the Python function to filter frog species by name length entry.  
The function accepts a list of names and a minimum length integer entry.  
It returns only those species names that exceed the specified character count entry.  

```python
def filter_species_by_length(species_list, min_length):
    return [name for name in species_list if len(name) > min_length]
```

This solution ensures each returned name meets the length requirement entry.  
The logic checks the length of every string in the provided list entry.  
Only names longer than the given integer are included in the final result entry.
